query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName, pv.createdAt,
       pb.id as box_id, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantName LIKE '%完整功能测试%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%最终测试%'
ORDER BY pv.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName, pv.createdAt,
       pb.id as box_id, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantName LIKE '%完整功能测试%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%最终测试%'
ORDER BY pv.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
